visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a split-screen layout. On the left side, various social media creators (a young girl, a woman) are seen squeezing and eating liquid-filled chocolate sticks. On the right, a young East Asian woman with long dark hair, wearing a white tank top, speaks directly to the camera with animated facial expressions, pointing at the videos on the left. The background is a plain, brightly lit indoor wall. (2) The scene transitions to the woman showing a digital interface of an online shopping app on her tablet, displaying various chocolate products like Pepero. She looks frustrated, touching her face and gesturing with her hands. Large yellow and white text overlays appear throughout, emphasizing her search. (3) The woman holds up two rectangular boxes of chocolate sticks: 'Orange Sticks' and 'Mint Sticks'. She smiles broadly and brings the boxes close to the camera to show the packaging details. The lighting is consistent and bright studio-style. (4) She opens the 'Orange Sticks' box, revealing dark chocolate sticks inside a plastic tray. She picks up three sticks, holding them horizontally toward the camera to show their textured surface. She then brings a small black microphone close to her mouth and begins eating the chocolate sticks with exaggerated chewing motions and satisfied expressions. (5) A brief cutaway shows a comparison between the liquid-filled sticks from the original video and her solid chocolate sticks. She points out the difference with a concerned look. (6) She then opens the 'Mint Sticks' box, reacts with surprise and delight, and proceeds to eat them while holding the microphone to capture the eating action. The camera remains at eye-level with a medium close-up shot size. (7) Finally, she holds the open box of mint chocolates and talks to the camera, gesturing with her hands as if asking a question, concluding the video in the same indoor setting.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Slogan]: 海外爆紅! 只有台灣沒有. [Slogan]: 果汁巧克力棒. [Logo]: die_liebe_tot_et_dich. [Subtitle]: 只有台灣沒有? (2) [Subtitle]: 可以喝果汁的巧克力棒. [Logo]: tzzu_nii. (3) [Variety]: 在韓國也爆紅!! [Variety]: 實驗歐膩. (4) [Subtitle]: 因為太多韓國網紅都吃這個. [Subtitle]: 我一直在台灣找貨!!! (5) [Variety]: 但沒有!! [Variety]: 瘋狂搜尋. (6) [Subtitle]: 找到很相似的東西! (7) [Subtitle]: 跟影片上的產品差不多型態的東西. (8) [Variety]: (不管怎樣) [Variety]: (先開心起來). (9) [Subtitle]: 究竟會一樣嗎? [Variety]: (橘子口味). (10) [Subtitle]: 但發現一個問題喔.... [Subtitle]: 裡面沒有果汁!!! (11) [Subtitle]: 在其他人影片都有果汁!!!!! (12) [Variety]: 薄荷口味. [Variety]: 哇!!!! (13) [Subtitle]: 很香~ (14) [Subtitle]: 喜歡薄荷巧克力的人一定要吃看看! [Subtitle]: 很好吃. (15) [Subtitle]: 雖然不是我找的產品但還是蠻好吃! [Subtitle]: 可是我非常想找看看那個原本的果汁巧克力棒. (16) [Subtitle]: 有人知道台灣在哪裡買得到嗎?

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator in the foreground, 2 adult females and 1 child female visible in the secondary inset videos.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: An East Asian woman with long, dark, slightly wavy hair, wearing a white ribbed tank top and simple jewelry.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A plain off-white or light gray wall in a domestic indoor setting, likely a bedroom or dedicated filming space. Digital interfaces of shopping websites are also shown as full-screen overlays.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio starts with a high-energy female voice speaking rapidly in Mandarin, accompanied by an upbeat, electronic dance music (EDM) background track featuring a clear four-on-the-floor beat and synthetic vocal chops. A sharp crunching sound effect is heard as the creators in the video eat. (2) A quick 'pop' sound effect signals a transition as the speaker's tone becomes more inquisitive and slightly frustrated, complaining about her inability to find the product. The EDM music continues at a steady volume underneath her narration. (3) A 'ding' sound effect highlights the moment she reveals the chocolate boxes. Her voice pitch rises with excitement. The background music maintains its tempo but simplifies its arrangement slightly to focus on her voice. (4) As she begins the eating section, a series of very crisp, amplified percussive 'crunch' sounds dominate the audio track, created as she bites into the chocolate sticks close to the microphone. The speaker makes soft 'mhm' and 'ah' vocalizations of pleasure between bites. (5) A comical 'slide whistle' or 'boing' sound effect is used when she realizes the sticks don't have liquid inside. Her voice drops in pitch slightly to reflect mock-disappointment before rising again as she tries the second flavor. (6) More rhythmic, high-frequency crunching sounds occur as she eats the mint chocolate. The EDM track builds slightly in intensity towards the end. (7) The video ends with a direct address to the audience, the speech rate remains fast but the volume of the BGM swells slightly before a quick hard cut to silence.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Linear: Hook -> Conflict -> Search -> Alternative Solution -> Review -> CTA
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video is a food review and reaction piece where the creator attempts to replicate a viral internet food trend involving liquid-filled chocolate sticks. She documents her failed search for the exact product in Taiwan, finds an alternative, and performs an ASMR-style tasting to evaluate the substitute while engaging her audience to help her find the original item.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The creator is reviewing products she seemingly bought herself to compare with a trend, though the products are clearly visible.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video combines high-energy social media narration with high-fidelity ASMR crunch sounds. The use of split-screen and on-screen text overlays is typical of modern short-form vertical video trends.
